summary: Comprehensive testing of Sarvbhasa platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional with real Sarvam integration, JWT auth, and Stripe payments. Frontend mostly working with tricolor theme, auth flows, and translation features. Main issue: Emergent branding still present.

design_issues.description: 'Made with Emergent' text found in footer/page content
Google and Telegram buttons present but Twitter missing

passed_tests: Landing page with tricolor theme and Hindi text
Sidebar navigation with all required items
Auth modal with Sign In/Create Account tabs
Text translation with real API integration
Translation History page with auth gating
action_item_for_main_agent: Remove 'Made with Emergent' branding text from the application. Add missing Twitter social login button in auth modal for completeness.
